creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
On 05/27/13 11:00, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/doxygen,
>
> Please note that PR ports/179010 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/179010
>

I'm already working on an update for this, the port currently does not build 
when PDF docs are enabled. I am working with doxygen's developer to get this 
corrected. While I appreciate the effort, I ask that this PR be closed.

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
